scope: live governance append-stream and hash-chain append callers
blocking_patterns: direct open(..., append mode) in live governance code
direct file.write(line) append in hash-chain loggers not routed through compat adapter

allowed_exemptions.runtime/governance/legacy_archives/claud: legacy archive; not live governance execution

hash_chain_preservation_rule: Callers must compute prior/hash-chain fields before invoking the append writer, and update in-memory prior pointers from the exact serialized line emitted by the governed writer.
verdict_rule: PASS only when no blocking live append-open call sites remain. Legacy archive exemptions are warning-only.
